---
title: "analysis"
author: "Aatish Prasad"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

```{r}
summary(penguins)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-penguins
#| title: Penguin Flipper Length vs Body Mass
ggplot(penguins, aes(x = flipper_length_mm, y = body_mass_g)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = species, shape = species)) +
  labs(
    title = "Penguin Size: Flipper Length vs Body Mass",
    subtitle = "Sample from Palmer Archipelago, Antarctica",
    x = "Flipper Length (mm)",
    y = "Body Mass (g)",
    color = "Species",
    shape = "Species"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

The plot @fig-penguins shows some stuff.
